articles.title: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
articles.summary: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns.

en.title: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
en.summary: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht nicht identifizierte Dateien zu anomalen Phänomenen im Rahmen historischer Transparenzbemühungen
de.summary: Das Pentagon veröffentlichte eine Reihe zuvor geheimer Dateien über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene, darunter Berichte über helle Lichter, sich drehende Objekte und ein NASA-Foto aus dem Jahr 1972, aber die Dokumente enthalten keine Hinweise auf außerirdische Technologie. In Kalifornien protokollierte das National UFO Reporting Center im Jahr 2026 80 Sichtungen, die von zigarrenförmigen Objekten und rotierenden Flachbildschirmen bis hin zu Feuerbällen und rosa-weißen Kugeln reichten, wobei Zeugen kurzes, schnelles Verschwinden und ungewöhnliche Flugmuster beschrieben.

articles.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
articles.summary: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, which the author reviews and finds no new evidence of extraterrestrial visitation, only blurry photos, grainy videos, and artist reconstructions. The files include an artist sketch of an alleged bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian report of a Russian aircraft violation, a 2023 Mexican Congress UAP testimony, heavily redacted documents, and various photographs and videos from the southwestern United States, Japan, and Apollo missions.

en.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
en.summary: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, which the author reviews and finds no new evidence of extraterrestrial visitation, only blurry photos, grainy videos, and artist reconstructions. The files include an artist sketch of an alleged bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian report of a Russian aircraft violation, a 2023 Mexican Congress UAP testimony, heavily redacted documents, and various photographs and videos from the southwestern United States, Japan, and Apollo missions.

de.title: UFO-Dateien enthüllen … das gleiche alte Material
de.summary: Präsident Donald Trump und das Kriegsministerium haben die UFO-Dateien veröffentlicht, die der Autor überprüft und keine neuen Beweise für außerirdische Besuche findet, sondern nur verschwommene Fotos, körnige Videos und Künstlerrekonstruktionen. Zu den Akten gehören eine Künstlerskizze eines angeblich bronzenen Metallobjekts, ein georgischer Bericht über einen russischen Flugzeugverstoß aus dem Jahr 2001, eine UAP-Aussage des mexikanischen Kongresses aus dem Jahr 2023, stark redigierte Dokumente sowie verschiedene Fotos und Videos aus dem Südwesten der USA, Japan und Apollo-Missionen.

articles.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' online – stream controversial UAP/UFO doc from anywhere
articles.summary: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.

en.title: A small Oregon town puts on a big UFO festival. Why it's worth a visit
en.summary: S. after Roswell. The festival, which began in 2000 to celebrate the 1950 McMinnville UFO sighting and photos, features speakers, live music, a parade, costume contests, and a vendor street fair, with tickets required for most speaker presentations.

de.title: Eine kleine Stadt in Oregon veranstaltet ein großes UFO-Festival. Warum es einen Besuch wert ist
de.summary: S. nach Roswell. Das Festival, das im Jahr 2000 begann, um die UFO-Sichtung und Fotos von McMinnville im Jahr 1950 zu feiern, bietet Redner, Live-Musik, eine Parade, Kostümwettbewerbe und einen Straßenmarkt mit Händlern. Für die meisten Rednerpräsentationen sind Tickets erforderlich.

summaries.file-release-department-of-war-releases-: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns. Specific incidents include a Lake Elsinore resident seeing a floating meteor‑like object that vanished after 30 seconds, a Fresno Zoo observer noting a light that hovered at 200‑300 feet and timed with the International Space Station, and a Mendocino couple witnessing pulsating colored lights that left in a white streak. The Pentagon’s release, described as “new and never‑before‑seen,” is part of a broader declassification effort that has already produced a 2024 report of hundreds of UAP incidents, none of which confirmed extraterrestrial technology. Experts caution that UAP videos are often misinterpreted and that the new files may fuel speculation without further analysis.
summaries.four-different-alien-species-retrieved-f: Former CIA‑funded researcher Dr. Hal Puthoff said the U.S. has recovered four distinct extraterrestrial species from crashed UFOs, citing unnamed insiders. Dr. Eric Davis, a former associate, identified the species as Grays, Nordics, Insectoids, and Reptilians, describing their humanoid features and noting that Nordics and Reptilians are roughly six feet tall. In 2023, former Air Force intelligence officer David Grusch testified that the U.S. possessed “non‑human biologics” from multiple UFO crashes, a claim echoed in Farah’s film “Age of Disclosure.” Puthoff and others have not provided direct evidence or detailed descriptions, and the claims remain unverified.
summaries.ufo-files-reveal-the-same-old-material: President Donald Trump and the Department of War released the UFO Files, which the author reviews and finds no new evidence of extraterrestrial visitation, only blurry photos, grainy videos, and artist reconstructions. The files include an artist sketch of an alleged bronze metallic object, a 2001 Georgian report of a Russian aircraft violation, a 2023 Mexican Congress UAP testimony, heavily redacted documents, and various photographs and videos from the southwestern United States, Japan, and Apollo missions. The author notes that many of the images are ambiguous, often identified as drones, balloons, or optical phenomena, and that the files contain redactions protecting eyewitness identities and sensitive information. The author remains skeptical, stating that no definitive evidence of alien visitation has emerged from the release and that further evidence would be required to change that assessment.
summaries.film-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-online-st: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.
summaries.a-small-oregon-town-puts-on-a-big-ufo-fe: The 26th Annual McMenamins UFO Festival in McMinnville, Oregon, runs from May 14 to 17 and is hosted by the Hotel Oregon, making it the second‑largest UFO festival in the U.S. after Roswell. The festival, which began in 2000 to celebrate the 1950 McMinnville UFO sighting and photos, features speakers, live music, a parade, costume contests, and a vendor street fair, with tickets required for most speaker presentations. Organizers say the event brings skeptics and believers together, and this year’s festival coincides with the release of new federal “UFO files,” adding fresh material for discussion. Most activities are free, but tickets can be purchased at ufofest.com, and the festival is held in the downtown historic district at 310 NE Evans St.

en.summary: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.

de.title: So schauen Sie sich „Sleeping Dog“ online an – streamen Sie die umstrittene UAP/UFO-Dokumentation von überall aus
de.summary: Der Journalist und Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell bespricht seinen neuen Dokumentarfilm mit NBC News-Korrespondent Gadi Schwartz. Der Dokumentarfilm trägt den Titel „Sleeping Dog“. Es untersucht Corbells Umgang mit Regierungsgeheimnissen. Es geht auch um Whistleblower und seine Suche nach der Wahrheit über UFOs.

en.title: A small Oregon town puts on a big UFO festival. Why it's worth a visit
en.summary: S. after Roswell. The festival, which began in 2000 to celebrate the 1950 McMinnville UFO sighting and photos, features speakers, live music, a parade, costume contests, and a vendor street fair, with tickets required for most speaker presentations.

de.title: Eine kleine Stadt in Oregon veranstaltet ein großes UFO-Festival. Warum es einen Besuch wert ist
de.summary: S. nach Roswell. Das Festival, das im Jahr 2000 begann, um die UFO-Sichtung und Fotos von McMinnville im Jahr 1950 zu feiern, bietet Redner, Live-Musik, eine Parade, Kostümwettbewerbe und einen Straßenmarkt mit Händlern. Für die meisten Rednerpräsentationen sind Tickets erforderlich.
